content:
# Arabian Gulf

**Summary**: A large gulf in the Middle East.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] studied the sedimentary environment of the arabian-gulf.

- [[2006-al-enezi|Al-Enezi, 2006]] sampled foraminifera from the Arabian Gulf to establish a baseline for comparison.

- [[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012]] quantified land reclamation from the Arabian Gulf since 1973.

- [[2012-amao|Amao, 2012]] collected samples from three locations along the Arabian Gulf coast.

- [[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013]] studied the pesticide levels within the Arabian Gulf's coastal and aquatic systems.

- [[2015-oyehan|Oyehan, 2015]] studied the impact of 1991 Gulf War oil spills on the Arabian Gulf coast.

- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] sampled sediment and biota from the Saudi coast of the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] studied coastal waters within the arabian-gulf to assess sewage impact.

- [[2015-malik|Malik, 2015]] identified bacterial strains from petroleum polluted waters in the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] studied the arabian-gulf to evaluate foraminiferal responses to local conditions.

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] mapped environmental sensitivity along the coast of the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] studied foraminiferal distribution across the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] identified the Arabian Gulf as a habitat for halophilic bacteria.

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] studied the impact of local crude oil on species native to the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] studied the impact of pollution on mangroves along the Arabian Gulf coast.

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] studied microplastic contamination within the Arabian Gulf waters.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] studied marine environments within the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] studied the impact of extreme conditions on marine life within the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024]] studied the Mg/Ca ratio as a paleothermometer within the Arabian Gulf.

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] studied the sedimentary sequence in the Arabian Gulf region.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] marginal sea with a gently inclined seafloor

- [[2006-al-enezi|Al-Enezi, 2006]] sampled foraminifera from the Arabian Gulf to establish a baseline for comparison.

- [[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012]] quantified land reclamation from the Arabian Gulf since 1973.

- [[2012-amao|Amao, 2012]] collected samples from three locations along the Arabian Gulf coast.

- [[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013]] studied the pesticide levels within the Arabian Gulf's coastal and aquatic systems.

- [[2015-oyehan|Oyehan, 2015]] studied the impact of 1991 Gulf War oil spills on the Arabian Gulf coast.

- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] sampled sediment and biota from the Saudi coast of the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] studied coastal waters within the arabian-gulf to assess sewage impact.

- [[2015-malik|Malik, 2015]] identified bacterial strains from petroleum polluted waters in the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] studied the arabian-gulf to evaluate foraminiferal responses to local conditions.

- [[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016]] mapped environmental sensitivity along the coast of the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] studied foraminiferal distribution across the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017]] identified the Arabian Gulf as a habitat for halophilic bacteria.

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] studied the impact of local crude oil on species native to the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] studied the impact of pollution on mangroves along the Arabian Gulf coast.

- [[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022]] studied microplastic contamination within the Arabian Gulf waters.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] studied marine environments within the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] studied the impact of extreme conditions on marine life within the Arabian Gulf.

- [[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024]] studied the Mg/Ca ratio as a paleothermometer within the Arabian Gulf.

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] studied the sedimentary sequence in the Arabian Gulf region.

## Formations Present

- [[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988]] quaternary-sediments

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Gulf is characterized by a high degree of variability in sedimentary environments due to limited oceanic influence and extreme climate. ([[1988-darwish|Darwish, 1988, p. 25]])

- Foraminiferal diversity in the Gulf tends to increase with depth but decrease with salinity. ([[2006-al-enezi|Al-Enezi, 2006, p. 13]])

- The gulf is rich with good fishing grounds and extensive coral reefs but faces pressure from industrialization. ([[2012-al-rowaished|Al-Rowaished, 2012, p. 27]])

- Samples were collected from Tarut, Mussalamia, and Abu Ali. ([[2012-amao|Amao, 2012, p. 22]])

- OPPs were not detected in sea water samples across the study area. ([[2013-mohammed|Mohammed, 2013, p. 14]])

- The coastal area contains a diverse and rich community of oil-degrading strains. ([[2015-oyehan|Oyehan, 2015, p. 18]])

- Significant variation in organotin levels was observed across different locations along the coast. ([[2015-akere|Akere, 2015, p. 11]])

- Significant nutrient enrichment was observed at all three outfall locations compared to the control site. ([[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015, p. 14]])

- Not stated in source ([[2015-malik|Malik, 2015]])

- The study area included Eastern Bahrain (Murray's Pool) and the Saudi coastline. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 80]])

- Identified critical ecosystems like coral reefs, seagrass beds, salt marshes, and mangroves in the study area. ([[2016-sudibyo|Sudibyo, 2016, p. 13]])

- Identified a wide range of benthic foraminifera from intertidal to deep offshore environments. ([[2017-amao|Amao, 2017, p. 143]])

- The Arabian Gulf is a primary source of hypersaline water containing organic pollutants like pyrene. ([[2017-budiyanto|Budiyanto, 2017, p. 6]])

- The study focused on the effects of Arabian Light Crude Oil on organisms within the Arabian Gulf ecosystem. ([[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018, p. 67]])

- The study area includes several sites like Tarut Bay and Abu Ali Island. ([[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019, p. 20]])

- The Arabian Gulf has a slow flushing time (more than 3 years), allowing microplastics to persist for long periods. ([[2022-alshaikhali|Alshaikhali, 2022, p. 22]])

- The region is a major fossil fuel production area with significant industrial history. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 17]])

- The region is projected to be among the most impacted by climate change, with temperatures potentially exceeding 35°C (lethal for many species). ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 32]])

- The study was the first to test the reliability of the Mg/Ca proxy specifically for benthic foraminifera in this region. ([[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024, p. 13]])

- The study area is located at 28° 55' 13.8" N and 47° 40' 34.5" E. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 24]])
